revision.comment: Removed deleted portal.
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons cat|Aftermath of World War II}} *'''[[Aftermath of World War II]]''' — events of the direct aftermath of [[World War II]], which had ended in 1945.
{{clr}} :::*Note: ''This category is for articles concerning [[World War II]] that deal primarily with the immediate [[Aftermath of World War II|aftermath of the war]]. Only articles eligible for [[:Category:World War II]] should be placed in this subcategory. Examples include peace treaties, war reparations, post-war diplomatic negotiations. The articles should be primarily concerned with World War II and its aftermath, and not a consequence that arose in subsequent years.''
:::{{For|consequences in subsequent years|Category: Cold War}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:World War II]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Aftermath of wars|World War II]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Contemporary history]] [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Category:Aftermath of World War II]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

{{Commons cat|Aftermath of World War II}} *'''[[Aftermath of World War II]]''' — events of the direct aftermath of [[World War II]], which had ended in 1945.
{{clr}} :::*Note: ''This category is for articles concerning [[World War II]] that deal primarily with the immediate [[Aftermath of World War II|aftermath of the war]]. Only articles eligible for [[:Category:World War II]] should be placed in this subcategory. Examples include peace treaties, war reparations, post-war diplomatic negotiations. The articles should be primarily concerned with World War II and its aftermath, and not a consequence that arose in subsequent years.''
:::{{For|consequences in subsequent years|Category: Cold War}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:World War II]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Aftermath of wars|World War II]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Contemporary history]] [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Aftermath of World War II]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

{{clr}} ::*Note: ''This category is for articles concerning [[World War II]] that deal primarily with the immediate [[Aftermath of World War II|aftermath of the war]]. Only articles eligible for [[:Category:World War II]] should be placed in this subcategory. Examples include peace treaties, war reparations, post-war diplomatic negotiations. The articles should be primarily concerned with World War II and its aftermath, and not a consequence that arose in subsequent years.''

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "tab went inactive so I need to add another category" to "qq"
Bot: tidy & size tag (5 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Contemporary history]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 4 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6801799)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

<!--templates-->
{{Commons cat|Aftermath of World War II}}
{{clr}}
{{For|consequences in subsequent years|Category: Cold War}}
{{wikidata link|Q6801799}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:Aftermath of World War II]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Aftermath of wars|World War II]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:World War II]]
